meta.title: The Navy's HELIOS laser is a big step toward laser air defense #laser #usnavy
meta.description:
The US Navy's recent HELIOS laser test isn't quite the science fiction weapon it's been made out to be... But it's a good step in that direction. 

Stay on top of all the latest in Defense Tech news by subscribing to Sandboxx!
